Target Following ROS2
  • Vision-Based Tracking Pipeline
  • View page source

Vision-Based Tracking Pipeline

This page documents the image processing and control logic used to follow an ArUco marker.

How the Algorithm Works

The software processes video frames at 30 FPS to calculate the real-time relative 3D coordinate frame of a target marker.

Safety Features

  • Watchdog Timeout: If the target marker is lost for longer than the timeout period, the node clears its filter states and commands zero velocity to prevent runaway conditions.

  • Turn-First Logic: Forward velocity is scaled by the cosine of the heading error, forcing the robot to pivot toward the target before accelerating forward.
